name: Academic Paper Finder
description: Find and summarize academic papers on any research topic

agents.name: Paper Searcher
agents.purpose: Search academic databases for relevant papers
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search Google Scholar, Semantic Scholar, and PubMed for papers on the given topic. Find highly cited papers, recent publications, and survey papers. Extract titles, authors, abstracts, and citation counts.

agents.name: Paper Summarizer
agents.purpose: Summarize found papers with key findings
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a literature review summary. Group papers by theme. For each paper provide a 2-3 sentence summary of key findings. Note methodology and limitations. Highlight the most impactful papers.

suggestion_card.title: Paper Finder
suggestion_card.subtitle: Find academic papers on any topic

author: agentfactory
